The White Room.author: Lexi K
The White Room.text: I cannot recommend Corey from COS enough. He fully exceeded our expectations when we were supposed to have our wedding at the White Room back in October but it got postponed to November due to hurricane Milton. He was able to accommodate on short notice and fully helped make our postponed reception the best night ever. Between him playing the saxophone and playing music that catered to the crowd we couldn't get off the dance floor the whole night. The planning process was so seamless (even with my million little questions and last minute additions) with the help from Corey and Kyle. We added the Saxophone, violin, uplighting, and photo booth, don't skip out on the sax it is fully worth it to have a little bit of live music!!! Would recommend a million times over again 11/10, I can't thank them enough!!

St. Augustine.author: Chelsea
St. Augustine.text: We were lucky enough to book COS Celebrations and DJ Corey for our NYE wedding at the end of 2023.  Corey immediately came across as an organized and reliable professional that knows how to have fun! We were able to meet with Corey prior to our wedding (virtually as we live 2 time zones away) and he made the entire process fun and personalized to exactly what we wanted.  We had secured a wedding planner and day of coordinator, but honestly, I could see how working with Corey you may not even need that (but shout out to Kelsi Elizabeth Events for being the best planner!!).  He was extremely communicative during the days leading up to and during our wedding, always making sure we were taken care of and having a great time.  We opted to add the Saxaphone add on and it was INCREDIBLE.  Everyone loved it and really got the party pumped up for NYE.  We also booked his extra lighting, cold sparklers and photobooth - everything was so great and really completed the event.  I could not recommend Corey enough; he made our day so special and provided a top-notch service.  You need Corey/COS on your vendor team!!
St. Augustine.title: Best DJ in St. Augustine!!

St. Augustine.author: Katherine H
St. Augustine.text:
Words can’t describe how special Corey and his team made my husband’s and my wedding day at the Lightner Museum in St. Augustine. Being from Boston, this was a destination wedding, and Corey and Kyle put us at ease every step of the way. Any questions we had were answered right away and very thoughtfully, which truly gave us peace of mind.

Corey made every single moment so special for us—he even played the sax during our entrance song, and it got the crowd going wild! We will truly never forget these moments and can’t recommend COS Celebrations enough. We feel so lucky to have worked with them and will absolutely be using them again for future events.

Corey is hands down the best DJ we could have ever asked for. He read the room perfectly, kept the energy high all night, and had every single guest on the dance floor. The music, the vibes, the transitions—everything was flawless. If you want a DJ who truly elevates your wedding and creates an unforgettable party, Corey is your guy.

St. Augustine.author: Nicole B
St. Augustine.text: Corey is the best. It was an incredible night and the dance floor was never empty. He is genuine and a great person to work with. We trusted him wholeheartedly to put together a song list that matched with who we are as people. He also checked in with us many times over the course of the night to see how we were doing and even offered to grab us drinks from the bar. The saxophone during Cocktail Hour was exceptional and he was able to work in a few Billy Joel songs to keep the Long Islanders in attendance happy. He was organized and utilized an app that allowed us to easily fill in song requests, first dance songs, last dance songs, etc. so that the night was all about what we wanted. We also loved the personalization for the photobooth background that Kyle put together for us featuring the St. Augustine Lighthouse. You can't go wrong with COS Celebrations, they are top notch in terms of entertainment and professionalism.

Lightner Museum.author: Katherine H
Lightner Museum.text:
Words can’t describe how special Corey and his team made my husband’s and my wedding day at the Lightner Museum in St. Augustine. Being from Boston, this was a destination wedding, and Corey and Kyle put us at ease every step of the way. The music, the vibes, the transitions—everything was flawless. If you want a DJ who truly elevates your wedding and creates an unforgettable party, Corey is your guy.

Lightner Museum.author: Avery
Lightner Museum.text: COS celebrations is a MUST hire for your event! Our guests did NOT want to leave because of the great atmosphere of music, dancing, and Corey on the sax! Hiring COS Celebrations is a great value for what was offered with communication, access to enter playlists, available options, and professionalism.
Lightner Museum.title: Wedding at the Lightner Museum 2026

Amelia Island.author: Kevin
Amelia Island.text:
Marc brought all the vibes!! I can’t even begin to imagine our special day without Marc and COS. From the beginning they were amazing. Easy to work with and always communicating professionally but yet relaxed. They put us first.

From the ceremony music to the grand entrance to the party on the dance floor, we were blessed to have Marc making the music happen. I highly recommend COS and Marc, what an incredible talent. Thank you Marc!!!
Amelia Island.title: Amelia Vibes with Marc!!

Casa Marina.author: Tyler
Casa Marina.text: COS celebrations and Corey did an absolutely perfect job for my wedding at Casa Marina in Jacksonville, FL. My wife and I met with him several times on zoom at no additional charge to discuss timeline and our desire for music selection and each time he was patient, professional, and truly helpful with adding inspiration or ideas for our party. He even set his zoom background to our venue so we could point and show him where things would be set up and done. The interface and app he and his team use to select our playlist was seamless to use, easy to edit, and allowed us to include others in our wedding party from a distance to select songs. He coordinated with all of our vendors and executed our timeline perfectly without us having to lift a finger, allowing us to truly enjoy our day. We had a wide range of ages at the wedding, and he used our playlist to make decisions in situ based on who was on the floor to keep the party moving all night. Also, he brought a saxophone and played it as part of the music during the dancing which was electric and made a lot of our guests very happy. We contracted live music through Corey for our welcome social the night before, and he handled booking that artist and delivering our vision. Corey truly wanted our night to be perfect and was invested in making sure the dance floor was always rocking. People came up to us, both old and young, and told us they had never seen a dance floor so full all night at a wedding. If you are looking for a DJ who is professional, artistic, easy to work with, and who will really care about making your day special, I can not recommend Corey and COS entertainment highly enough. He was the best I have ever seen at a wedding.
Casa Marina.title: Perfect, Best I have ever seen

Treasury on the Plaza.author: Marla M
Treasury on the Plaza.text:
Everyone at COS was amazing! They were so quick to respond to any questions I had and Kyle made the entire process of booking so easy! 
I can’t say enough great things about CJ! He was so attentive to our requests and helped us create the perfect entrance at the Treasury. It felt like we had a friend as our DJ instead of someone that was just playing music for us. You can tell he loves what he does and that made for perfect entertainment! 
Thank you again!
